violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
One of the hand-washing sinks behind the deli counter was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (soda machine ice chute) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Deli meats observed held at 42 - 43 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit lowboy. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Ambient temperature of the unit observed at 41 degrees F. Deli meats were being stored in fish buckets, blocking proper air flow. Deli meats were taken out of fish buckets and only small amounts will be stored in this unit so as not to block air flow. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The exit door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025
Knife observed stored between the prep unit and a table. In-use utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

ROP crabmeat observed thawing in the refrigerator in its' original packaging. ROP products must be removed from packaging in order to allow Oxygen into the food product for food safety. Temperature of ROP crabmeat observed at 37 degrees F. Crabmeat was removed from packaging during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

Thermometer is lacking in the storefront 3-door reach-in refrigeration unit. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024

Several foods packaged in the food establishment, stored in the storefront 3-door reach-in, are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Resource provided. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

The cutting boards in the prep unit area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New cutting boards have been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
